Modern Product Marketing in the Agentic Era

The Pragmatic 37 → Agentic Funnel Map

0/37

Start here: Chapter One introduces the curriculum framework and explains how the 37 Pragmatic activities map to the modern agentic funnel. Complete the introduction before diving into specific activities.

📖 Chapter 1: Introduction

The Pragmatic 37 → Agentic Funnel Map

Click any activity to learn more. Check off activities as you complete them.

Market Problems Market Definition Positioning Awareness Marketing Plan Events Launch Content
Consideration MOFU

User Personas Requirements Channels Operations Buy/Build/Partner Stakeholder Comm.
